info.title: Taskosaur API
info.description: A comprehensive project management API similar to Jira, Asana, and Monday.com

invitationToken.description: Invitation token (allows registration even when public registration is disabled)

refresh_token.description: Refresh token (optional — can also be sent via httpOnly cookie)

email.description: User email address to send password reset link

token.description: Password reset token received via email

password.description: New password - must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and number

confirmPassword.description: Confirm new password - must match the password field

email.description: Email address for the super admin

password.description: Password for the super admin (minimum 8 characters)

firstName.description: First name of the super admin

lastName.description: Last name of the super admin

bio.example: Senior Software Developer with 5+ years of experience in full-stack development.
Senior Software Developer with 5+ years of experience in full-stack development.

isOnline.description: Whether the user is currently online

lastSeen.description: Last seen timestamp in ISO 8601 format

status.description: Map of user IDs to their status

isEncrypted.description: Whether the value should be encrypted

description.example: Leading technology company focused on innovative solutions for modern businesses.

ownerId.description: ID of the user who owns this organization

slug.description: Organization URL slug (auto-generated from name if not provided)
The unique slug identifier for the workspace (used in URLs)

description.example: Workspace for managing product development projects and tasks

avatar.description: Optional avatar URL for the workspace

color.description: Optional color theme for the workspace in hexadecimal format

settings.description: Optional settings configuration for the workspace

organizationId.description: The unique identifier of the organization this workspace belongs to

parentWorkspaceId.description: Optional parent workspace ID for creating nested workspaces

inheritMembers.description: Whether to inherit members from the organization or parent workspace

inheritLabels.description: Whether to inherit label templates from the parent workspace projects

inheritWorkflows.description: Whether to inherit workflow configuration from the parent workspace projects

slug.description: The unique slug identifier for the project (used in URLs)

taskPrefix.description: Custom prefix for tasks in this project

description.example: Complete redesign of the e-commerce platform to improve user experience, increase conversion rates, and modernize the technology stack.

workspaceId.description: ID of the workspace this project belongs to

workflowId.description: ID of the workflow to use for this project (if not provided, organization default will be used)

daysOfWeek.description: Days of week for WEEKLY recurrence (0=Sunday, 6=Saturday)

dayOfMonth.description: Day of month for MONTHLY/QUARTERLY/YEARLY recurrence (1-31)

monthOfYear.description: Month of year for YEARLY recurrence (1-12)

endDate.description: Date when recurrence ends (required if endType is ON_DATE)

occurrenceCount.description: Number of occurrences (required if endType is AFTER_OCCURRENCES)
